feedback: Split-pane approved. Form on left ~40%, live cover preview on right ~60%. Clean, matches DESIGN.md exactly. Cover variant dropdown at top of preview; Preview-at-print-size toggle at bottom.
direction: Left form: Issue title, Issue number+date (side-by-side), Cover lines (with +add and ×remove per line, rust 'Add cover line' button at end), Price, Barcode drop-zone. Right: sticky cover preview with masthead display serif, hero slot, 4 cover lines bottom-left.
ai_drift_notes: Sidebar in the mockup shows all 8 tabs correctly. 'Templates' tab dimmed (OK, this mockup shows that state). No critical drift.
